subject: Adding new sub repo and modules, along with rest endpoint, test case and Spring Application class
commit_message:
Adding new sub repo and modules, along with rest endpoint, test case and Spring Application class

Issue-ID: CPS-431

Change-Id: I6fd4379df6133108c1f8f2a5339f990f16773ad6
Signed-off-by: DylanB95EST <dylan.byrne@est.tech>

entries.message: Patch Set 2: Commit message was updated.

Patch Set 2:

(3 comments)

have you considered use more complex and ordered structure like used under cps, cps-tbdmt..
having bom , dependency modules, etc.. ?

Patch Set 3:

(3 comments)

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> (3 comments)
> 
> have you considered use more complex and ordered structure like used under cps, cps-tbdmt..
> having bom , dependency modules, etc.. ?

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> (3 comments)
> 
> have you considered use more complex and ordered structure like used under cps, cps-tbdmt..
> having bom , dependency modules, etc.. ?

For the moment we just wanted to see see whether the Jenkins Jobs for the new sub repo kicked off when a commit was made to it, which is why everything is condensed into a few modules.
